74100.subject: 🦞 Wall Street Opens Its Doors
74100.body: 96 🦞 Wall Street Opens Its Doors @media only screen and (max-width: 620px) { table.body { width: 100%; min-width: 100%; } table.body .content { padding: 0 !important; } table.body .container { padding: 0 !important; width: 100% !important; } table.body .main { border-spacing: 10px 0 !important; border-left-width: 0 !important; border-radius: 0 !important; border-right-width: 0 !important; } table.body .img-responsive { height: auto !important; max-width: 100% !important; width: auto !important; } } @media all { .ExternalClass { width: 100%; } .ExternalClass, .ExternalClass p, .ExternalClass span, .ExternalClass font, .ExternalClass td, .ExternalClass div { line-height: 100%; } .apple-link a { color: inherit !important; font-family: inherit !important; font-size: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: inherit !important; text-decoration: none !important; } #MessageViewBody a { color: inherit; text-decoration: none; font-size: inherit; font-family: inherit; font-weight: inherit; line-height: inherit; } } @media only screen and (max-width: 620px) { table[class=body] h1 { font-size: 28px !important; margin-bottom: 10px !important; } table[class=body] p, table[class=body] ul, table[class=body] ol, table[class=body] td, table[class=body] span, table[class=body] a { font-size: 16px !important; } table[class=body] .wrapper, table[class=body] .article { padding: 10px !important; } table[class=body] .content { padding: 0 !important; } table[class=body] .container { padding: 0 !important; width: 100% !important; } table[class=body] .main { border-left-width: 0 !important; border-radius: 0 !important; border-right-width: 0 !important; } table[class=body] .btn table { width: 100% !important; } table[class=body] .btn a { width: 100% !important; } table[class=body] .img-responsive { height: auto !important; max-width: 100% !important; width: auto !important; } table[class=body] p[class=small], table[class=body] a[class=small] { font-size: 11px !important; } } .kg-nft-link { display: block; text-decoration: none !important; color: #000000 !important; font-family: inherit !important; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.3; padding-top: 4px; padding-right: 20px; padding-left: 20px; padding-bottom: 4px; } .kg-twitter-link { display: block; text-decoration: none !important; color: #000000 !important; font-family: inherit !important; font-size: 15px; padding: 8px; line-height: 1.3; } .kg-cta-link-accent .kg-cta-sponsor-label a { color: #ff4141 !important; } .kg-cta-text a:not(.kg-cta-link-accent .kg-cta-text a) { color: #000000; text-decoration: none; } .kg-cta-link-accent .kg-cta-text a { color: #ff4141 !important; } @media only screen and (max-width: 620px) { table.body .kg-bookmark-card { width: 90vw; } table.body .kg-bookmark-thumbnail { display: none !important; } table.body .kg-bookmark-metadata span { font-size: 13px !important; } table.body .kg-embed-card { max-width: 90vw !important; } table.body .kg-cta-card { padding: 0 20px; } table.

74098.subject: 📉 Crypto market implodes as Zcash gets hacked
74098.body:
Today’s newsletter is brought to you by **[Choose Rich Live](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**[!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)

Our very own Nick O’Neill is has launched a new stream covering crypto, finance, AI, tech, and the stories shaping the internet economy.

If you already follow Nick, you know what to expect: sharp takes, market chaos, founder brain, and the occasional banger you’ll see clipped on the timeline five minutes later.

Episodes will be streaming live on YouTube, so make sure you’re subscribed to catch the next one as it happens.

**[Subscribe to Choose Rich Live!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**

———————————————————————————

## Top Stories

**BTC** $61,781 (-1.2%) | **ETH** $1,659 (-5.3%) | **SOL** $66 (-4.2%)

* [Zcash wicks below $250](https://x.com/Tyler_Did_It/status/2062851566424432689?s=20) as team releases post-mortem of Orchard exploit, where hackers could have created unlimited ZEC tokens — Due to the security feature of Zcash there if [no way to cryptographically prove](https://x.com/zooko/status/2062644925590900980?s=20) whether the vulnerability was exploited

* Arthur Hayes [sells all](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2062726392123461873?s=20) of his ZEC holdings

* Over [$1.1B gets liquidated](https://www.coinglass.com/liquidations) from the crypto market as Bitcoin falls to 62K

* Solana treasury company Forward Industries[ transfers $32M](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2062842782650351966?s=20) worth of SOL to Coinbase

* The S&P 500 and Dow Jones will [not be changing rules](https://x.com/JSeyff/status/2062647758603866453?s=20) to allow mega-IPOs coming this year to enter indices early

* First Fannie Mae insured [Bitcoin backed mortgage](https://x.com/tokens/status/2062595287433335154?s=20) has been funded

* ETH and BTC ETFs [break outflow streak](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2062808845903433740?s=20) with first day of inflows in weeks

* Grayscale releases report containing concerns about [Strategy’s ability to buy Bitcoin](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2062845573598728338?s=20) going forward

* US and Japan announce [$1B partnership](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2062589755041239115?s=20) to advance AI, quantum, fusion, and biotech

* [Pattern Day Trader](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2062520942752850147?s=20) rule officially ends

* Coinbase announces [pre-IPO perps trading](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2062490604957757448?s=20) for SpaceX

* Jupiter launches Solana’s [first native prediction market](https://x.com/JupiterExchange/status/2062527793053974908?s=20)

* Spacecoin announces [$100M deal](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2062494842446569815?s=20) to build decentralized a satellite network

* Pump Fun launches [Pump Fun Go](https://x.com/Pumpfun/status/2062557004829233504?s=20) bounty platform

———————————————————————————


———

You are reading a plain text version

73968.subject: RE: Переклад.
73968.body:
Добрий день!
Можемо забезпечити переклади, але попередньо рекомендуємо проконсультуватись з церквою,  де буде проводитись обряд вінчання які документи необхідні для проведення цієї процедури.  

Адреса офісу:

 <https://www.google.com/maps/search/Torysk%C3%A1+3+040+11+Ko%C5%A1ice?entry=gmail&source=g> Toryská 3

 <https://www.google.com/maps/search/Torysk%C3%A1+3+040+11+Ko%C5%A1ice?entry=gmail&source=g> 040 11 Košice

2-й поверх, 110  кабінет

Робочі години – 8:00 – 16:00, пн-пт.

З повагою,

UA preklady s.r.o.

+421918635854





 

 

From: Oleg Novosadov <novosadovoleg@gmail.com> 
Sent: Tuesday, June 2, 2026 8:36 PM
To: info@ua-preklady.sk
Subject: Переклад.

 

Доброго дня, 

 

Цікавить переклад документів для вінчання у Словаччині.

 

Дякую. 

 

Гарного дня.

73274.subject: Svadobná výzdoba
73274.body:
Zdravíme nevestu💍🤍,

Ďakujeme veľmi pekne za vašu správu.. Termín svadby máme ešte voľný a veľmi
radi budeme súčasťou vašej svadby.🤍

Spravidla sa s klientami stretávame osobne v showroome v Rozhanovciach
(kúsok od Košíc) kde si spolu vieme vyskladať svadobnú výzdobu a na základe
toho vytvoriť cenovú ponuku na mieru pre vás ak by ste mali záujem prosím
navrhnite deň a čas kedy by vám to najviac vyhovovalo aby sa časovo radi
prispôsobíme vášmu času. Poprípade, ak sme mimo Košíc či Prešova, radi si s
Vami dohodneme videohovor. Prosím navrhnite deň a čas, ktorý by Vám
vyhovoval najviac, pokojne aj cez víkend aj vo večerných hodinách. 🙂
Najbližsie voľne termíny máme ešte aj tento týždeň. Forme stretnutia sa
radi prispôsobíme Vám, čo je pre Vás praktickejšie ☺️

Budeme sa tešiť na prípadnú spoluprácu s Vami.

S pozdravom

Lenka Gattiker,
Vaša osobná posh asistentka
